testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 1. Create test-only Todo list should create an empty todo list file
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 1. Create test-only Todo list should create an empty todo list file

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 1. Create test-only Todo list should handle reading from non-existent file
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 1. Create test-only Todo list should handle reading from non-existent file

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 2. Add Todos should add a single todo
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 2. Add Todos should add a single todo

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 2. Add Todos should add multiple todos
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 2. Add Todos should add multiple todos

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 2. Add Todos should preserve activeForm field
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 2. Add Todos should preserve activeForm field

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should reorder todo from beginning to end
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should reorder todo from beginning to end

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should reorder todo from end to beginning
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should reorder todo from end to beginning

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should reorder adjacent todos
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should reorder adjacent todos

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should fail with invalid indices
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should fail with invalid indices

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should persist reordering to file
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 3. Reorder Todos should persist reordering to file

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should rename a todo
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should rename a todo

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should trim whitespace from new content
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should trim whitespace from new content

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should fail with empty content
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should fail with empty content

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should fail with invalid index
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should fail with invalid index

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should persist renaming to file
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 4. Rename Todos should persist renaming to file

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should delete a todo from the middle
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should delete a todo from the middle

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should delete the first todo
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should delete the first todo

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should delete the last todo

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should fail with invalid index
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should fail with invalid index

testcase.classname: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should persist deletion to file
testcase.name: TodoManager E2E Test Suite 5. Delete Todos should persist deletion to file
